Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Please hold it, Portal components are not coming up in my env with these values, Anyone please crosscheck, I think cassandra taking large values.

Patch Set 2:

Most of Portal components are based on Java.

Some values measured on one Beijing installation:
pod                                     cpu     memory
onap-portal-app-765f57f9b7-8ncft	11m	786
onap-portal-cassandra-fdd79fccc-lsx4d	30m	2808
onap-portal-db-7d9b8f4f4c-mjggt	        3m	136
onap-portal-sdk-6d4757d4fc-s4d74	1m	1859
onap-portal-widget-64c9d944f7-fsp64	0m	795
onap-portal-zookeeper-696c5f95cb-625wz	0m	73

Cassandra is launched with java -Xmx2536m -Xms2536m. I believe that we can reduce such values, because Portal does not manage a lot of data. To be checked with PTL 

portal-sdk and app are based on tomcat...I believe that 0.5 Gi memory request for small is enough

We should also set JAVA_OPTS in the deployment.yaml for the various java components should be aligned
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3:

The values were added as per observations from current CPU and memory values observed in Dashboard of Rancher , optimum values were used during configuration . (kindly refer to the logs and attach ment)
